PL/SQL Scripts / Scripts PL/SQL

Scripts PL/SQL

01

Activity 1 — Sequences

Sequence creation, error handling and ALTER to fix MAXVALUE overflow.
TRG

Triggers

Salary audit trigger for department 80 with exception handling.
FIB

Fibonacci

Three implementations: range procedure, WHILE loop, and basic LOOP.
EJ

Countries Exercise

Foreign keys, DECLARE blocks, stored procedure and INSERT dataset.
EMP

Employee Query

ROWTYPE variable, salary calculation with NVL and commission discount.
T1

Workshop — Payroll System

Full PL/SQL payroll liquidation system for HotelGroup S.A.
